name: working-methods
description: Cross-project working norms of David. The SPINE: /forge-run sequences and ENFORCES the whole methodology (align+brainstorm → reference-decomposition → draft + /grill ×3+completeness → owner checkpoint #1 → spec+Acceptance-Matrix → re-grill ×2 → owner checkpoint #2 → global plan+execution proposal → execution → verify → /handoff; exactly 2 batched owner interruptions) via a deterministic workflows/forge.js + a PR-gate hook (guard-forge-artifacts) — the order is codified, not remembered. Plus /grill (adversarial ×3), /handoff (session relay), /install-family (bootstrap the 5-plugin family), and forge-on-claude. REQUIRES the forge-methodology plugin (forge-on-claude delegates to its skill) and uses design-review in the verify phase. Model routing baked in.
